description:
This domain exposes CSS read/write operations. All CSS objects (stylesheets, rules, and styles)
have an associated `id` used in subsequent operations on the related object. Each object type has
a specific `id` structure, and those are not interchangeable between objects of different kinds.
CSS objects can be loaded using the `get*ForNode()` calls (which accept a DOM node id). A client
can also keep track of stylesheets via the `styleSheetAdded`/`styleSheetRemoved` events and
subsequently load the required stylesheet contents using the `getStyleSheet[Text]()` methods.

types.description:
Stylesheet type: "injected" for stylesheets injected via extension, "user-agent" for user-agent
stylesheets, "inspector" for stylesheets created by the inspector (i.e. those holding the "via
inspector" rules), "regular" for regular stylesheets.
CSS rule collection for a single pseudo style.

properties.name: pseudoType
properties.description: Pseudo element type.

properties.name: pseudoIdentifier
properties.description: Pseudo element custom ident.

properties.name: matches
properties.description: Matches of CSS rules applicable to the pseudo style.

types.description: CSS style coming from animations with the name of the animation.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the animation.

properties.name: style
properties.description: The style coming from the animation.

types.description: Inherited CSS rule collection from ancestor node.

properties.name: inlineStyle
properties.description: The ancestor node's inline style, if any, in the style inheritance chain.

properties.name: matchedCSSRules
properties.description: Matches of CSS rules matching the ancestor node in the style inheritance chain.

types.description: Inherited CSS style collection for animated styles from ancestor node.

properties.name: animationStyles
properties.description: Styles coming from the animations of the ancestor, if any, in the style inheritance chain.

properties.name: transitionsStyle
properties.description: The style coming from the transitions of the ancestor, if any, in the style inheritance chain.

types.description: Inherited pseudo element matches from pseudos of an ancestor node.

properties.name: pseudoElements
properties.description: Matches of pseudo styles from the pseudos of an ancestor node.

types.description: Match data for a CSS rule.

properties.name: rule
properties.description: CSS rule in the match.

properties.name: matchingSelectors
properties.description: Matching selector indices in the rule's selectorList selectors (0-based).

types.description: Data for a simple selector (these are delimited by commas in a selector list).

properties.name: text
properties.description: Value text.

properties.name: range
properties.description: Value range in the underlying resource (if available).

properties.name: specificity
properties.description: Specificity of the selector.

properties.name: a
properties.description: The a component, which represents the number of ID selectors.

properties.name: b
properties.description:
The b component, which represents the number of class selectors, attributes selectors, and
pseudo-classes.

properties.name: c
properties.description: The c component, which represents the number of type selectors and pseudo-elements.

properties.name: selectors
properties.description: Selectors in the list.

properties.name: text
properties.description: Rule selector text.

properties.name: styleSheetId
properties.description: The stylesheet identifier.

properties.name: frameId
properties.description: Owner frame identifier.

properties.name: sourceURL
properties.description:
Stylesheet resource URL. Empty if this is a constructed stylesheet created using
new CSSStyleSheet() (but non-empty if this is a constructed stylesheet imported
as a CSS module script).

properties.name: sourceMapURL
properties.description: URL of source map associated with the stylesheet (if any).

properties.name: origin
properties.description: Stylesheet origin.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Stylesheet title.

properties.name: ownerNode
properties.description: The backend id for the owner node of the stylesheet.

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Denotes whether the stylesheet is disabled.

properties.name: hasSourceURL
properties.description: Whether the sourceURL field value comes from the sourceURL comment.

properties.name: isInline
properties.description:
Whether this stylesheet is created for STYLE tag by parser. This flag is not set for
document.written STYLE tags.

properties.name: isMutable
properties.description:
Whether this stylesheet is mutable. Inline stylesheets become mutable
after they have been modified via CSSOM API.
`<link>` element's stylesheets become mutable only if DevTools modifies them.
Constructed stylesheets (new CSSStyleSheet()) are mutable immediately after creation.

properties.name: isConstructed
properties.description:
True if this stylesheet is created through new CSSStyleSheet() or imported as a
CSS module script.

properties.name: startLine
properties.description: Line offset of the stylesheet within the resource (zero based).

properties.name: startColumn
properties.description: Column offset of the stylesheet within the resource (zero based).

properties.name: length
properties.description: Size of the content (in characters).

properties.name: endLine
properties.description: Line offset of the end of the stylesheet within the resource (zero based).

properties.name: endColumn
properties.description: Column offset of the end of the stylesheet within the resource (zero based).

properties.name: loadingFailed
properties.description: If the style sheet was loaded from a network resource, this indicates when the resource failed to load

properties.name: styleSheetId
properties.description:
The css style sheet identifier (absent for user agent stylesheet and user-specified
stylesheet rules) this rule came from.

properties.name: selectorList
properties.description: Rule selector data.

properties.name: nestingSelectors
properties.description: Array of selectors from ancestor style rules, sorted by distance from the current rule.

properties.name: origin
properties.description: Parent stylesheet's origin.

properties.name: style
properties.description: Associated style declaration.

properties.name: originTreeScopeNodeId
properties.description: The BackendNodeId of the DOM node that constitutes the origin tree scope of this rule.

properties.name: media
properties.description:
Media list array (for rules involving media queries). The array enumerates media queries
starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

properties.name: containerQueries
properties.description:
Container query list array (for rules involving container queries).
The array enumerates container queries starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

properties.name: supports
properties.description:
@supports CSS at-rule array.
The array enumerates @supports at-rules starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

properties.name: layers
properties.description:
Cascade layer array. Contains the layer hierarchy that this rule belongs to starting
with the innermost layer and going outwards.

properties.name: scopes
properties.description:
@scope CSS at-rule array.
The array enumerates @scope at-rules starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

properties.name: ruleTypes
properties.description: The array keeps the types of ancestor CSSRules from the innermost going outwards.

properties.name: startingStyles
properties.description:
@starting-style CSS at-rule array.
The array enumerates @starting-style at-rules starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

properties.name: navigations
properties.description:
@navigation CSS at-rule array.
The array enumerates @navigation at-rules starting with the innermost one, going outwards.

types.description:
Enum indicating the type of a CSS rule, used to represent the order of a style rule's ancestors.
This list only contains rule types that are collected during the ancestor rule collection.

properties.name: styleSheetId
properties.description:
The css style sheet identifier (absent for user agent stylesheet and user-specified
stylesheet rules) this rule came from.

properties.name: startOffset
properties.description: Offset of the start of the rule (including selector) from the beginning of the stylesheet.

properties.name: endOffset
properties.description: Offset of the end of the rule body from the beginning of the stylesheet.

properties.name: used
properties.description: Indicates whether the rule was actually used by some element in the page.

types.description: Text range within a resource. All numbers are zero-based.

properties.name: startColumn

properties.name: endLine

Returns whether or not this node is being rendered with base appearance,
which happens when it has its appearance property set to base/base-select
or it is in the subtree of an element being rendered with base appearance.

commands.name: addRule
commands.description:
Inserts a new rule with the given `ruleText` in a stylesheet with given `styleSheetId`, at the
position specified by `location`.

parameters.name: styleSheetId
parameters.description: The css style sheet identifier where a new rule should be inserted.

parameters.name: ruleText
parameters.description: The text of a new rule.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Text position of a new rule in the target style sheet.

parameters.name: nodeForPropertySyntaxValidation
parameters.description:
NodeId for the DOM node in whose context custom property declarations for registered properties should be
validated. If omitted, declarations in the new rule text can only be validated statically, which may produce
incorrect results if the declaration contains a var() for example.

returns.name: rule
returns.description: The newly created rule.

commands.name: collectClassNames
commands.description: Returns all class names from specified stylesheet.

returns.name: classNames
returns.description: Class name list.

commands.name: createStyleSheet
commands.description: Creates a new special "via-inspector" stylesheet in the frame with given `frameId`.

parameters.name: frameId
parameters.description: Identifier of the frame where "via-inspector" stylesheet should be created.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description:
If true, creates a new stylesheet for every call. If false,
returns a stylesheet previously created by a call with force=false
for the frame's document if it exists or creates a new stylesheet
(default: false).

returns.name: styleSheetId
returns.description: Identifier of the created "via-inspector" stylesheet.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the CSS agent for the given page.

commands.name: enable
commands.description:
Enables the CSS agent for the given page. Clients should not assume that the CSS agent has been
enabled until the result of this command is received.

commands.name: forcePseudoState
commands.description:
Ensures that the given node will have specified pseudo-classes whenever its style is computed by
the browser.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The element id for which to force the pseudo state.

parameters.name: forcedPseudoClasses
parameters.description: Element pseudo classes to force when computing the element's style.

commands.name: forceStartingStyle
commands.description: Ensures that the given node is in its starting-style state.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The element id for which to force the starting-style state.

parameters.name: forced
parameters.description: Boolean indicating if this is on or off.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node to get background colors for.

returns.name: backgroundColors
returns.description:
The range of background colors behind this element, if it contains any visible text. If no
visible text is present, this will be undefined. In the case of a flat background color,
this will consist of simply that color. In the case of a gradient, this will consist of each
of the color stops. For anything more complicated, this will be an empty array. Images will
be ignored (as if the image had failed to load).

returns.name: computedFontSize
returns.description: The computed font size for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. '12px').

returns.name: computedFontWeight
returns.description:
The computed font weight for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. 'normal' or
'100').

commands.name: getComputedStyleForNode
commands.description: Returns the computed style for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: computedStyle
returns.description: Computed style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: extraFields
returns.description:
A list of non-standard "extra fields" which blink stores alongside each
computed style.

commands.name: resolveValues
commands.description:
Resolve the specified values in the context of the provided element.
For example, a value of '1em' is evaluated according to the computed
'font-size' of the element and a value 'calc(1px + 2px)' will be
resolved to '3px'.
If the `propertyName` was specified the `values` are resolved as if
they were property's declaration. If a value cannot be parsed according
to the provided property syntax, the value is parsed using combined
syntax as if null `propertyName` was provided. If the value cannot be
resolved even then, return the provided value without any changes.
Note: this function currently does not resolve CSS random() function,
it returns unmodified random() function parts.`

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: Cascade-dependent keywords (revert/revert-layer) do not work.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: Id of the node in whose context the expression is evaluated

parameters.name: propertyName
parameters.description: Only longhands and custom property names are accepted.

parameters.name: pseudoType
parameters.description:
Pseudo element type, only works for pseudo elements that generate
elements in the tree, such as ::before and ::after.

parameters.name: pseudoIdentifier
parameters.description: Pseudo element custom ident.

commands.name: getInlineStylesForNode
commands.description:
Returns the styles defined inline (explicitly in the "style" attribute and implicitly, using DOM
attributes) for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: inlineStyle
returns.description: Inline style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: attributesStyle
returns.description: Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from "width=20 height=100%").

commands.name: getAnimatedStylesForNode
commands.description:
Returns the styles coming from animations & transitions
including the animation & transition styles coming from inheritance chain.

returns.name: animationStyles
returns.description: Styles coming from animations.

returns.name: transitionsStyle
returns.description: Style coming from transitions.

returns.name: inherited
returns.description:
Inherited style entries for animationsStyle and transitionsStyle from
the inheritance chain of the element.

commands.name: getMatchedStylesForNode
commands.description: Returns requested styles for a DOM node identified by `nodeId`.

returns.name: inlineStyle
returns.description: Inline style for the specified DOM node.

returns.name: attributesStyle
returns.description: Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from "width=20 height=100%").

returns.name: matchedCSSRules
returns.description: CSS rules matching this node, from all applicable stylesheets.

returns.name: pseudoElements
returns.description: Pseudo style matches for this node.

returns.name: inherited
returns.description: A chain of inherited styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).

returns.name: inheritedPseudoElements
returns.description: A chain of inherited pseudo element styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).

returns.name: cssKeyframesRules
returns.description: A list of CSS keyframed animations matching this node.

returns.name: cssPositionTryRules
returns.description: A list of CSS @position-try rules matching this node, based on the position-try-fallbacks property.

returns.name: activePositionFallbackIndex
returns.description:
Index of the active fallback in the applied position-try-fallback property,
will not be set if there is no active position-try fallback.

returns.name: cssPropertyRules
returns.description: A list of CSS at-property rules matching this node.

returns.name: cssPropertyRegistrations
returns.description: A list of CSS property registrations matching this node.

returns.name: cssAtRules
returns.description: A list of simple @rules matching this node or its pseudo-elements.

returns.name: parentLayoutNodeId
returns.description: Id of the first parent element that does not have display: contents.

returns.name: cssFunctionRules
returns.description: A list of CSS at-function rules referenced by styles of this node.

commands.name: getEnvironmentVariables
commands.description: Returns the values of the default UA-defined environment variables used in env()

commands.name: getMediaQueries
commands.description: Returns all media queries parsed by the rendering engine.

commands.name: getPlatformFontsForNode
commands.description:
Requests information about platform fonts which we used to render child TextNodes in the given
node.

returns.name: fonts
returns.description: Usage statistics for every employed platform font.

commands.name: getStyleSheetText
commands.description: Returns the current textual content for a stylesheet.

returns.name: text
returns.description: The stylesheet text.

commands.name: getLayersForNode
commands.description:
Returns all layers parsed by the rendering engine for the tree scope of a node.
Given a DOM element identified by nodeId, getLayersForNode returns the root
layer for the nearest ancestor document or shadow root. The layer root contains
the full layer tree for the tree scope and their ordering.

commands.name: getLocationForSelector
commands.description:
Given a CSS selector text and a style sheet ID, getLocationForSelector
returns an array of locations of the CSS selector in the style sheet.

commands.name: trackComputedStyleUpdatesForNode
commands.description:
Starts tracking the given node for the computed style updates
and whenever the computed style is updated for node, it queues
a `computedStyleUpdated` event with throttling.
There can only be 1 node tracked for computed style updates
so passing a new node id removes tracking from the previous node.
Pass `undefined` to disable tracking.

commands.name: trackComputedStyleUpdates
commands.description:
Starts tracking the given computed styles for updates. The specified array of properties
replaces the one previously specified. Pass empty array to disable tracking.
Use takeComputedStyleUpdates to retrieve the list of nodes that had properties modified.
The changes to computed style properties are only tracked for nodes pushed to the front-end
by the DOM agent. If no changes to the tracked properties occur after the node has been pushed
to the front-end, no updates will be issued for the node.

commands.name: takeComputedStyleUpdates
commands.description: Polls the next batch of computed style updates.

returns.name: nodeIds
returns.description: The list of node Ids that have their tracked computed styles updated.

commands.name: setEffectivePropertyValueForNode
commands.description:
Find a rule with the given active property for the given node and set the new value for this
property

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The element id for which to set property.

commands.name: setPropertyRulePropertyName
commands.description: Modifies the property rule property name.

returns.name: propertyName
returns.description: The resulting key text after modification.

commands.name: setKeyframeKey
commands.description: Modifies the keyframe rule key text.

returns.name: keyText
returns.description: The resulting key text after modification.

commands.name: setMediaText
commands.description: Modifies the rule selector.

returns.name: media
returns.description: The resulting CSS media rule after modification.

commands.name: setContainerQueryText
commands.description: Modifies the expression of a container query.

returns.name: containerQuery
returns.description: The resulting CSS container query rule after modification.

commands.name: setSupportsText
commands.description: Modifies the expression of a supports at-rule.

returns.name: supports
returns.description: The resulting CSS Supports rule after modification.

commands.name: setNavigationText
commands.description: Modifies the expression of a navigation at-rule.

returns.name: navigation
returns.description: The resulting CSS Navigation rule after modification.

commands.name: setScopeText
commands.description: Modifies the expression of a scope at-rule.

returns.name: scope
returns.description: The resulting CSS Scope rule after modification.

commands.name: setRuleSelector
commands.description: Modifies the rule selector.

returns.name: selectorList
returns.description: The resulting selector list after modification.

commands.name: setStyleSheetText
commands.description: Sets the new stylesheet text.

returns.name: sourceMapURL
returns.description: URL of source map associated with script (if any).

commands.name: setStyleTexts
commands.description: Applies specified style edits one after another in the given order.

parameters.name: nodeForPropertySyntaxValidation
parameters.description:
NodeId for the DOM node in whose context custom property declarations for registered properties should be
validated. If omitted, declarations in the new rule text can only be validated statically, which may produce
incorrect results if the declaration contains a var() for example.

returns.name: styles
returns.description: The resulting styles after modification.

commands.name: startRuleUsageTracking
commands.description: Enables the selector recording.

commands.name: stopRuleUsageTracking
commands.description:
Stop tracking rule usage and return the list of rules that were used since last call to
`takeCoverageDelta` (or since start of coverage instrumentation).

commands.name: takeCoverageDelta
commands.description:
Obtain list of rules that became used since last call to this method (or since start of coverage
instrumentation).

returns.name: timestamp
returns.description: Monotonically increasing time, in seconds.

commands.name: setLocalFontsEnabled
commands.description: Enables/disables rendering of local CSS fonts (enabled by default).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Whether rendering of local fonts is enabled.

events.name: fontsUpdated
events.description:
Fires whenever a web font is updated.  A non-empty font parameter indicates a successfully loaded
web font.

parameters.name: font
parameters.description: The web font that has loaded.

events.name: mediaQueryResultChanged
events.description:
Fires whenever a MediaQuery result changes (for example, after a browser window has been
resized.) The current implementation considers only viewport-dependent media features.

events.name: styleSheetAdded
events.description: Fired whenever an active document stylesheet is added.

parameters.name: header
parameters.description: Added stylesheet metainfo.

events.name: styleSheetChanged
events.description: Fired whenever a stylesheet is changed as a result of the client operation.

events.name: styleSheetRemoved
events.description: Fired whenever an active document stylesheet is removed.

parameters.name: styleSheetId
parameters.description: Identifier of the removed stylesheet.

parameters.name: nodeId
parameters.description: The node id that has updated computed styles.
